revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-2-005

The designated geographical location at which a light vessel can serve as an aid to navigation. It is indicated on charts and in other appropriate nautical documents.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Light vessel station}}
